news.t: Here are ETF themes and categories investors may want to consider in the second half of 2023

holdings.infoBox: BDVG is an equity ETF with a total of 40 individual holdings. The top holdings are Chevron stock at 4.86%, JPMorgan Chase & Co. at 4.17%, AbbVie at 3.88%, Apple at 3.86%, and Nucor at 3.61%.

overview.description: The iMGP Berkshire Dividend Growth ETF (BDVG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund seeks income and long-term capital appreciation through an actively managed portfolio of 30 to 40 US large-cap companies with high, stable, and growing dividends. BDVG was launched on Jun 30, 2023 and is issued by iMGP.

data.title: Here are ETF themes and categories investors may want to consider in the second half of 2023
data.text: Hello! This is markets reporter Isabel Wang bringing you this week's ETF Wrap. In this week's edition, I spoke with CFRA's Aniket Ullal, head of ETF data and analytics, about thematic ETF ideas and in...
